message:
fix(memory): accept boolean values in POST body for logContext

The booleanQueryParam schema only accepts strings (for URL query params),
but ContextQuerySchema is used for POST body parsing. If a client sends
{"logContext": true} with a native JSON boolean, validation would fail.

Added booleanBodyParam schema that accepts both boolean and string values
for POST body fields.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
